ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity (e.g., financial instrument, company) associated with the ratio */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio (e.g., Q1, Q2, M1, M2) */,
  "numerator" REAL /* Numerator value of the ratio */,
  "denominator" REAL /* Denominator value of the ratio */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value of the ratio */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the ratio was calculated */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the ratio (e.g., formula, algorithm) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ratio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ratio was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the ratio */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ratio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., stock, bond, company) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the entity belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the entity belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entity */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition to be evaluated (e.g., Q1 < Q2 and M1 != 0) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to be taken if the condition is true (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison result */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity being evaluated */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comparison rule applied */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was performed */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the comparison result (e.g., true, false) */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision taken based on the comparison result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES comparison_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity involved */,
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial ratio involved */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comparison rule involved */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., calculate, compare, decide) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES comparison_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_ratio_id FOREIGN KEY ("ratio_id") REFERENCES financial_ratios ("ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, risk manager, compliance officer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is assigned */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, risk manager, compliance officer) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the permission applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratio_types" (
  "ratio_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ratio type */,
  "ratio_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ratio type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ratio type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ratio type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ratio type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the ratio type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ratio type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratio_type_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial ratio */,
  "ratio_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ratio type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratio_type_mappings_ratio_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ratio_type_id") REFERENCES ratio_types ("ratio_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratio_type_mappings_ratio_id FOREIGN KEY ("ratio_id") REFERENCES financial_ratios ("ratio_id")
)
